Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Each line seems to have: - Timestamp: like 2024-12-11T08:59:50.000Z - Then an action type: FOCUS, TYPING, SAVE, SWITCH, CLICK, SCROLL, HIGHLIGHT, CLOSE - Then App=... (application) - Then Window=... (window title)

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the actions and applications: - Multiple FOCUS with Microsoft Word: Quarterly_Report.docx and Document1.docx - TYPING with Microsoft Word: Document1.docx - SAVE with Microsoft Word: Document1.docx - Then SWITCH involves: FromApp=Microsoft Word, FromWindow=Document1.docx, ToApp=Google Chrome, ToWindow=Email - Inbox

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This looks like a logical flow: starting with Word operations on reports, then typing/saving in Word, then switching to Chrome/Email, then interacting with Email (opening, scrolling, replying, highlighting), then moving to Excel budget operations, then back to Word document operations, then finally Word quarterly report.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For case identification, I could group events that belong to the same logical unit of work. For example: - The initial FOCUS and FOCUS on Word might be part of a Working with Word documents case. - Then the TYPING, SAVE on Word Document1 might be continuing that case. - Then the SWITCH that goes to Chrome/Email might start a new case: Working with Email via Chrome.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - NE
Text: All Microsoft Word events (regardless of window) could be Case 1: Interacting with Microsoft Word applications. Then events 5-9 involve Google Chrome and Email-Inbox, so Case 2: Interacting with Email via Google Chrome. Events 10-13 involve Microsoft Excel and Budget_2024.xlsx, so Case 3: Interacting with Microsoft Excel budgeting.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: To avoid overlap, I need to make the cases mutually exclusive. Perhaps: - Case 1: events 1-4 only (the initial Word block) - Case 2: event 5 - Case 3: events 6-9 - Case 4: event 10 - Case 5: events 11-13 - Case 6: event 14 - Case 7: events 15-21 (the final Word block)

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Perfect. Now, no overlap: - Case 1: 1-4 - Case 2: 5 - Case 3: 6-9 - Case 4: 10 - Case 5: 11-13 - Case 6: 14 - Case 7: 15-21

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Since no mapping is provided, for this transformation, I think I should output the Activity Name as the raw action type from the system log.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each event: - Case ID: the case number it belongs to - Activity Name: the action type from the system log (e.g., FOCUS, TYPING) - Timestamp: the timestamp from the system log
